scripts.content:images:check: NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" bun run run-with-sharp-runtime.ts node validate-image-compatibility.ts
scripts.images:sync: NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" bun run run-with-sharp-runtime.ts node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env --env-file-if-exists=../../.env.local sync-images.ts
